title: Workhorse Group Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text:
Workhorse Group Q1 2023 Financial Results

Report Date: May 15, 2023

Period Covered: First Quarter ended March 31, 2023

Key Financial Metrics

Net Sales: $1.7 million (compared to $14.3 thousand in Q1 2022). Cost of Sales: $5.3 million (compared to $3.9 million). Gross Loss: ($3.6 million) (compared to ($3.9 million)). SG&A Expenses: $14.7 million (compared to $11.9 million). R&D Expenses: $7.2 million (compared to $4.0 million). Net Loss: ($25.0 million) (compared to ($22.1 million)). Loss Per Share: ($0.15) (compared to ($0.15)).

Balance Sheet Highlights (as of March 31, 2023)

Cash and equivalents: $79.1 million. Total current assets: $132.8 million. Total assets: $181.4 million. Total liabilities: $76.6 million. Stockholders' equity: $104.8 million.

2023 Guidance

The company reaffirmed its outlook of $75-125 million in revenue in 2023.
